title: philotheca scabra subsp. latifolia
intro: Philotheca scabra subsp. latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved Philotheca, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Philotheca scabra subsp. latifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
